title: 1010 Elixir Alchemy
description: Enter the enchanting world of 1010 Elixir Alchemy, where strategic placement reigns supreme. Strategically place Tetris-style blocks on a 10x10 grid to collect Elixirs. Complete rows or columns to gather Elixirs. If the grid fills up with remaining Elixirs, its game over. With 60 levels, master the art of alchemy in this addictive adventure!
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game
